name: Priya Sharma
resumeText: Frontend-focused engineer with 7 months of professional experience since graduating. Strong in React; CSS; and building polished user interfaces. Backend exposure is minimal and limited to a single class project; no production PostgreSQL experience and primarily used Firebase and MongoDB. Very friendly and outgoing; loves collaborating with large teams and organizing events. Eager to learn but does not yet meet the 3 to 5 year senior backend requirement and lacks the required relational database depth. Looking to transition toward backend work in the future.
